chunks.text: Technical Reports | EECS at UC Berkeley. Technical Reports - Stella Yu. Visualizing High-Dimensional Hyperbolic Data (EECS-2022-127) Haoran Guo, Yunhui Guo and Stella Yu. Deep Learning Applications in Computational MRI: A Thesis in Two Parts (EECS-2021-91) Sukrit Arora.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the technical reports listed?
chunks.answer: Visualizing High-Dimensional Hyperbolic Data and Deep Learning Applications in Computational MRI.
